rules.rule_text:
title: Scheduled Task Creation
status: experimental
description: Detects the creation of scheduled tasks in user session
author: Florian Roth
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image: '*\schtasks.exe'
    CommandLine: '* /create *'
  filter:
    User: NT AUTHORITY\SYSTEM
  condition: selection and not filter
fields:
- CommandLine
- ParentCommandLine
tags:
- attack.execution
- attack.persistence
- attack.privilege_escalation
- attack.t1053
- attack.s0111
falsepositives:
- Administrative activity
- Software installation
level: low
